page_content:
# Configuration file for testing YAML content loading
# AlitaTextLoader should load this as raw text, preserving YAML structure  
application:
name: TestApp
version: 1.0.0
environment: development  
database:
host: localhost
port: 5432
name: testdb
credentials:
username: admin
password: ${DB_PASSWORD}  
features:
- feature_flags
- logging
- monitoring
- authentication  
settings:
max_connections: 100
timeout: 30
retry_attempts: 3
cache:
enabled: true
ttl: 3600
size: 1024  
logging:
level: INFO
format: "%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s"
handlers:
- type: console
level: DEBUG
- type: file
level: INFO
filename: app.log
max_bytes: 10485760
backup_count: 5  
# Nested structure test
services:
web:
image: nginx:latest
ports:
- "80:80"
- "443:443"
environment:
- ENV=production
- DEBUG=false  
api:
image: python:3.9
command: ["python", "app.py"]
volumes:
- ./code

"app.py"]
volumes:
- ./code:/app
- ./logs:/logs
depends_on:
- database
- cache  
# Unicode and special characters in YAML
metadata:
description: "Test file with émojis 🚀 and spëcial çharacters"
tags: [testing, yaml, unicode, 数据, テスト]
notes: |
Multi-line string with various content:
- Line 1: Normal text
- Line 2: Special chars: © ® ™ € £
- Line 3: Math symbols: ∀ ∃ ∈ ≈ ≠
